source.subsection:
## **![](https://www.gramophone.co.uk/media/sm4pyvak/beethoven-piano-sonatas-nos-28-32.png)**

## **Beethoven** Piano Sonatas Nos 28-32

**Paul Wee** _pf_(BIS)

Having hugely impressed in virtuosic but lesser-recorded repertoire, pianist Paul Wee now demonstrates brilliance of colour and technique in Beethoven’s final sonatas, the most core of repertoire.

[**Read the _Gramophone_ review**](https://www.gramophone.co.uk/review/beethoven-the-last-piano-sonatas-paul-wee)

source.subsection:
## **![](https://www.gramophone.co.uk/media/hkxdoqb4/beethoven-sciarrino.jpg)**

## **Beethoven** Piano Concerto No 4 **Sciarrino** Il Sogno di Stradella

**Jonathan Biss** _pf_ **Swedish RSO / Malin Broman; Omer Meir Wellber**(Orchid)

Jonathan Biss’s ongoing survey of Beethoven’s piano concertos – this time No 4 – paired with a modern companion offers another superb instalment.

[**Read the _Gramophone_ review**](https://www.gramophone.co.uk/review/beethoven-piano-concerto-no-4-sciarrino-il-sogno-di-stradella-jonathan-biss)

source.raw: JS BACH Mass in B minor
source.subsection:
## ![](https://www.gramophone.co.uk/media/pw1ppji0/js-bach-mass-in-b-minor-ensemble-pygmalion-raphae-l-pichon.jpg)

## JS BACH Mass in B minor

**Pygmalion / Raphaël Pichon**

Label: Harmonia Mundi

Further confirming him as a Bach conductor of deeply reflective sincerity, Raphaël Pichon follows his Award-winning _St Matthew Passion_ with the B minor Mass.

[**Read the _Gramophone_ review**](https://www.gramophone.co.uk/review/js-bach-mass-in-b-minor-pichon)

source.subsection:
## **![](https://www.gramophone.co.uk/media/u0zjgibw/09-mozart-bezuidenhout.jpg)**

## **Mozart** Piano Concertos Nos 19 & 23

**Kristian Bezuidenhout** _fp_ **Freiburg Baroque Orchestra**(Harmonia Mundi)

Kristian Bezuidenhout continues his always-enjoyable survey of Mozart’s music for keyboard with wonderful performances of Piano Concertos Nos 19 and 23.

[**Read the _Gramophone_ review**](https://www.gramophone.co.uk/review/mozart-piano-concertos-nos-19-and-23-kristian-bezuidenhout)
